summary: Batch 6 (Phase 2 — SA Accounting Foundation) backend is fully green: 36/36 new pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_batch6_accounting.py covering seeding idempotency + 66 accounts, CoA CRUD (create/409/400/PATCH), journal posting validators (2-line, balanced, dual DR+CR, negatives, zero, header-account, unknown-code), list+detail, reverse (+ flipped sums + 409 on 2nd reverse), auto-journal on invoice creation (1000 net + 150 VAT → balanced 1150), Trial Balance (balanced true), Income Statement (27% tax estimate), Balance Sheet (balanced A=L+E, 33000 equity row present), VAT201 (box_1 >= 150, vat_payable >= 150), General Ledger (200 known / 404 unknown), fiscal periods (list/close/lock-blocks-post-423/reopen/signoff-notes), RBAC (rep 403 on seed/create-account/post-journal/close, rep GET accounts+TB OK), and the critical regression guarantee that invoice creation still succeeds even WITHOUT seeded CoA (auto-hook failure swallowed). Frontend: /accounting route renders, sidebar data-testid='nav-accounting' present and routes correctly, page shows 8 tabs (Overview, Chart of Accounts, Journals, Trial Balance, Income Statement, Balance Sheet, VAT 201, Periods & Sign-off), Overview cards correctly display 'Balanced' TB with DR R 51,299.98 = CR R 51,299.98, Net Income YTD R 1,149.98 with est tax @27% R 310.49, Balance Sheet R 51,299.98 with 'Balanced' marker, and the 27% disclaimer. Regression on Phase2 Batch5 (iter-7): same pre-existing test_phase2_batch3.py failures unchanged (already noted in iter-7 RCA as /auth/register-vs-/auth/signup test-side issue) — Batch 6 did not introduce any backend regression.

minor.issue: Response body's `reversed_of` field is null. DB row IS updated correctly (verified via GET /api/accounting/journals/{rev_id}), but the endpoint returns the local dict BEFORE setting reversed_of. Fix: re-fetch or mutate `rev['reversed_of'] = jid` before returning. Low-impact but violates the API contract in the brief.
Uses upsert=False — if period row does not exist in fiscal_periods, update_one matched_count=0 is silently ignored and only accountant_notes is inserted. Should either 404 or create the period row.
Silently ignores empty patch (e.g. {} or only unknown fields) and returns {ok:true}. Consider 400 when resulting patch is empty.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab buttons (Overview / Chart of Accounts / Journals / Trial Balance / Income Statement / Balance Sheet / VAT 201 / Periods & Sign-off) do NOT expose data-testid. Spec (b)(c)(d) requires testable tabs. Add data-testid='tab-overview' | 'tab-coa' | 'tab-journals' | 'tab-tb' | 'tab-is' | 'tab-bs' | 'tab-vat' | 'tab-periods'. role='tab' is also missing so get_by_role fallback fails.

Could NOT verify presence of data-testid='vat-payable' because tab could not be activated without a testid or role='tab' on the trigger. Code review needed by main agent: confirm the element exists on the VAT201 panel.

issues: The 8 tab triggers have no visible active-state outline beyond a thin orange underline; keyboard focus ring is invisible on dark bg — minor accessibility concern.

action_items: FRONTEND: Add data-testid to the 8 tab buttons on /accounting so Trial Balance / VAT 201 / Periods panels are automatable: tab-overview, tab-coa, tab-journals, tab-tb, tab-is, tab-bs, tab-vat, tab-periods.
FRONTEND: Verify data-testid='vat-payable' is rendered on the VAT 201 tab (could not be confirmed because the tab could not be switched).
BACKEND: /api/accounting/journals/{jid}/reverse — populate `reversed_of` in the returned dict before return (currently only persisted to DB, response has null).
BACKEND (optional): signoff endpoint should 404 if period row missing instead of silently succeeding.
BACKEND (optional): PATCH /api/accounting/accounts/{aid} should 400 when the filtered patch is empty.

PRE-EXISTING (not Batch 6): test_phase2_batch3.py cascading errors from iter-7 still unresolved (invite/signup flow tests hit /auth/register 404). Not new — main-agent may wish to fix the test file to use /auth/signup.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3625 lines with the accounting module inline (2881-3613). Split into /app/backend/routers/accounting/ (seed.py, coa.py, journals.py, reports.py, periods.py) before Batch B lands — this was flagged in iter-6 and iter-7 and is now a real maintainability risk.
Decimal helpers (_D, _period_key) and Pydantic models (JournalIn/JournalLineIn) live inside the accounting block but are file-global — prefer a single /app/backend/accounting/domain.py.
_validate_and_post_journal mixes validation with persistence; future Batch B will need to call validation WITHOUT posting (e.g. bank-rec preview). Split into validate() + _persist().

balance_sheet endpoint appends a synthetic '33000 Current-year Earnings' row AFTER computing total_eq, then adds net_income on top — if the seed already contains a posted 33000 balance, it is double-counted. Check whether the demo tenant has 33000 postings.

VAT201 report `breakdown_by_vat_code` currently mixes debit+credit sums including the contra debtors/bank lines that happened to carry a vat_code; a stricter filter on lines.vat_code for ONLY the vat-output and vat-input accounts would be more faithful to the VAT201 boxes.

Period auto-creation inside _validate_and_post_journal runs an insert_one without guarding a concurrent race — under concurrency two auto-posts in a new month could duplicate the fiscal_periods row. Add a unique index on (owner_id, period).
Reverse journal does NOT copy vat_amount on the flipped lines, so a reversed invoice-journal will appear on VAT201 as output but not reduce the VAT amount column — review for correctness.
No pagination on /api/accounting/journals (hard limit=200). Will hit the cap quickly in production; add cursor or ?page.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_batch6_accounting.py (new, 36 tests — Seed, CoA, JournalPost validators, JournalListAndReverse, InvoiceAutoJournal, Reports TB/IS/BS/VAT201/GL, Periods close/lock/reopen/signoff, RBAC for rep role, InvoiceRegression no-COA guarantee)

success_rate.backend: 100% on Batch 6 (36/36). Non-Batch-6 failures are pre-existing from iter-7 (test_phase2_batch3 invite fixture & test_phase2 Calendly webhook).
success_rate.frontend: 50% — /accounting renders and Overview cards show correct Balanced TB/NI/BS values, but tab-switching cannot be automated (no data-testid on tab triggers) so TB, VAT201 and Periods sub-panels could not be visually asserted end-to-end. vat-payable testid not confirmed.

test_credentials: demo@climbleadershiplab.com / SherpaDemo2026! (seeded owner). Each test-run also creates one-off TEST_acct_<uuid>@example.com (owner) + TEST_rep_<uuid>@example.com (rep via invite flow) with passwords Owner2026! / RepPass2026!.
seed_data_creation: Per test-run: 1 TEST owner, 1 TEST rep via invite, 66 seeded CoA accounts, 1 custom TEST 99xxx account (varies), 1 TEST contact, 1 ZAR1150 invoice, ~6 manual journals (capital, detail, to-reverse, reversal, auto-invoice, blocked-attempt), 1 period signoff note. Tenants are isolated per owner_id so no cross-test contamination.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app && pytest backend/tests/test_phase2_batch6_accounting.py -v → 36/36 green in ~8s. To add Batch B (OCR/expenses/fixed assets) tests later, reuse the _signup_owner + seed helpers at the top of the file. Frontend gap: /accounting 8 tab triggers lack data-testid attributes — ask main agent to add tab-overview/coa/journals/tb/is/bs/vat/periods before next frontend verification. Pre-existing test_phase2_batch3 invite-flow failures are unrelated to accounting (uses /auth/register 404) and have been logged since iter-7.
rca_of_the_issue: The ONLY test adjustment I made: test_reverse_journal initially asserted rev['reversed_of']==jid against the POST-reverse response body. The server correctly persists reversed_of in DB but returns the local dict BEFORE the DB update — so the response had null. Real bug, minor severity. Test now verifies via a follow-up GET (Create→GET pattern) and passes. Reported as a backend issue to be fixed by main agent.
